services.name: pub.vault:clearCache
services.description: WmPublic. Removes retrieved secrets from the cache.

output_parameters.name: message
output_parameters.description: String. A message that indicates whether the cached secrets for the provided alias are removed or not.

usage_notes: Complete the Prerequisite Tasks before you run this service.
Integration Server caches secrets in memory for the time-to-live period that is configured for the vault connection alias after which Integration Server automatically clears the stale entries.
If you specify a package-level vault connection alias, the service clears the secrets cache only for that package. Otherwise, the service clears the entire secrets cache.

services.name: pub.vault:decrypt
services.description: WmPublic. Decrypts ciphertext by using a vault server.

input_parameters.name: package
input_parameters.description: String. Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

input_parameters.name: alias
input_parameters.description: String. The name of the vault connection alias that determines the vault server to use for decrypting the provided ciphertext.

input_parameters.name: cipherText
input_parameters.description: String. The ciphertext that you want to decrypt by using the vault server.

output_parameters.name: plainText
output_parameters.description: String. The decrypted data in plaintext.

usage_notes: Complete the Prerequisite Tasks before you run this service.

services.name: pub.vault:encrypt
services.description: WmPublic. Encrypts plaintext by using a vault server.

input_parameters.name: package
input_parameters.description: String. Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

input_parameters.name: alias
input_parameters.description: String. The name of the vault connection alias that determines the vault server to use for encrypting the provided text.

input_parameters.name: plainText
input_parameters.description: String. The plaintext that you want to encrypt by using the vault server.

output_parameters.name: cipherText
output_parameters.description: String. The plaintext in the encrypted format. For example, see the sample cipherText.

usage_notes: Complete the Prerequisite Tasks before you run this service.

services.name: pub.vault:getSecretSubkey
services.description: WmPublic. Retrieves a secret subkey from a vault.

input_parameters.name: package
input_parameters.description: String. Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

input_parameters.name: alias
input_parameters.description: String. The name of the vault connection alias that identifies the vault server containing the secret subkey to retrieve.

input_parameters.name: secretKey
input_parameters.description: String. The secret subkey that you want to get from a secret in the vault.

output_parameters.name: secretValue
output_parameters.description: String. The value of the subkey retrieved from the vault.

output_parameters.name: cacheHit
output_parameters.description: String. Conditional. Indicates whether the subkey was found in the secrets cache or not. The service returns one of the following values: true, if secretKey is retrieved from the secrets cache. false, if secretKey is not retrieved from the secrets cache because the secretKey is not available in the cache or it is retrieved for the first time. This parameter is returned only when the secrets cache for the vault connection alias is enabled.

usage_notes: Complete the Prerequisite Tasks before you run this service.

services.name: pub.vault:refreshCache
services.description: WmPublic. Updates retrieved secrets in the cache.

input_parameters.name: package
input_parameters.description: String. Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

input_parameters.name: alias
input_parameters.description: String. The name of the vault connection alias that identifies the vault server from which secrets are retrieved to refresh the secrets cache. If you specify a package-level vault connection alias, the service refreshes the secrets cache only for the package. Otherwise, the service refreshes the entire secrets cache.

output_parameters.name: message
output_parameters.description: String. A message that indicates whether the cached secrets for the provided alias are refreshed or not.

usage_notes: Complete the Prerequisite Tasks before you run this service.
The pub.vault:refreshCache services refreshes cached secretes that were retrieved using the provided alias. Refreshing the secrets prevents the use of stale entries.

services.name: pub.vault:removeSecret
services.description: WmPublic. Removes a secret from a vault.

input_parameters.name: package
input_parameters.description: String. Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

input_parameters.name: alias
input_parameters.description: String. The vault connection alias that identifies the vault server to remove secrets.

output_parameters.name: message
output_parameters.description: String. A message that indicates whether the secret is removed or not.

usage_notes: Complete the Prerequisite Tasks before you run this service.

services.name: pub.vault:removeSecretSubkey
services.description: WmPublic. Removes a secret subkey from a vault.

input_parameters.name: package
input_parameters.description: String. Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

input_parameters.name: alias
input_parameters.description: String. The vault connection alias that identifies the vault server containing the secret subkey to remove.

input_parameters.name: secretKey
input_parameters.description: String. The secret subkey to remove from a secret in the vault.

output_parameters.name: message
output_parameters.description: String. A message that indicates whether the secret subkey is removed or not.

usage_notes: Complete the Prerequisite Tasks before you run this service.

services.name: pub.vault:setSecretSubkey
services.description: WmPublic. Inserts a secret subkey into a vault or updates a secret subkey in the vault.

input_parameters.name: package
input_parameters.description: String. Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

input_parameters.name: alias
input_parameters.description: String. The vault connection alias that identifies the vault server to insert or update a secret subkey.

input_parameters.name: secretKey
input_parameters.description: String. Name of the secret subkey.

input_parameters.name: secretValue
input_parameters.description: String. Value of the secret subkey.

output_parameters.name: message
output_parameters.description: String. A message that indicates whether the secret subkey is set or not.

usage_notes: Complete the Prerequisite Tasks before you run this service.

services.name: pub.vault:upsertSecret
services.description: WmPublic. Inserts a secret into a vault or updates a secret in a vault.

input_parameters.name: package
input_parameters.description: String. Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

input_parameters.name: alias
input_parameters.description: String. The vault connection alias that identifies the vault server to insert or update a secret.

input_parameters.name: secrets
input_parameters.description: Document List. The secret that must be inserted or updated.

input_parameters.name: key
input_parameters.description: String. Name of a secret subkey.

input_parameters.name: value
input_parameters.description: String. Value of the secret subkey.

output_parameters.name: message
output_parameters.description: String. A message that indicates whether insertion or update of secrets is successful or not.

usage_notes: Complete the Prerequisite Tasks before you run this service.
The pub.vault:upsertSecret service either updates an existing secret in a vault with the provided key-value pairs or creates a new secret by adding the provided key-value pairs to the vault.
